---
name: 'Documentation improvement 📚'
about: 'Found a typo or have a suggestion to improve our docs? 📖'
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

**What needs to be improved?** 📝
A clear and concise description of what is missing, confusing, or outdated in the current documentation.

**Where is the issue?** 📍
Point out the exact file, link, or section that needs adjustments (e.g., `README.md` in the Installation section).

**Proposed solution** ✅
Describe what you suggest should be written or changed. If you already have the text ready, you can paste it here.

**Additional context** 📌
Add any other context, reference links, or screenshots about the documentation issue here.
